description: Composition Green printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has an embroidered V-neck with mirror work, contrast panels on the sides of the yoke, blue piping along the empire waist and along the side lengths of the kurta, full sleeves with contrast panel cuffs and slit hems, and has a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent A perfect blend of the ethnic and modern, this kurta from aneri comes with an embroidered yoke and contrast panels that make it a perfect addition to your casual wardrobe. The cotton fabric flatters your silhouette and offers exemplary comfort. Team it with leggings or pyjamas and sleek earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
